sub_mechanisms: M_1: FWHT projection of input vector to ±1 signature
M_2: bit-signature lookup table to expert id
M_4: dequantize signature to expert weights
stripped_llm_application: Router applies a sign-projection (FWHT) of the input to obtain a ±1 signature; the signature is used as a lookup key into expert ids; per-bit-position sub-pool selection yields the final expert; dequantization reassembles the weighting.
novelty_claim_stripped: ReMoE, EMoE, Sinkhorn-MoE use learned soft routing; QuaRot/QuaRot-style Hadamard is used for activation smoothing/quantization, NOT as a router.
